overview:
SCStreamDelegate  streamDidBecomeActive(_:) Instance MethodstreamDidBecomeActive(_:)Mac Catalyst 18.2+macOS 15.2+optional func streamDidBecomeActive(_ stream: SCStream) Parameters streamThe SCStream object

streamDidBecomeActive:

notifies the delegate the first time any window that was being shared in the stream is re-opened after all the windows being shared are closed.  When all the windows being shared are closed, the client will receive streamDidBecomeInactive:.

## [ Parameters ](/documentation/ScreenCaptureKit/SCStreamDelegate/streamDidBecomeActive(_:)#parameters)

`stream`The SCStream object

## [Discussion](/documentation/ScreenCaptureKit/SCStreamDelegate/streamDidBecomeActive(_:)#discussion)

streamDidBecomeActive:

notifies the delegate the first time any window that was being shared in the stream is re-opened after all the windows being shared are closed. When all the windows being shared are closed, the client will receive streamDidBecomeInactive:.
